url.label: Flair URL
url.help: Base URL for the Flair server (local or Harper Fabric)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: TPS agent identifier (used for memory namespacing and Ed25519 auth)

keyPath.label: Private Key Path
keyPath.help: Path to Ed25519 private key for Flair authentication

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context at session start

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum number of memories to return from search (1–20)

maxBootstrapTokens.label: Max Bootstrap Tokens
maxBootstrapTokens.help: Maximum tokens of memory context to inject on session start
